Home»Lifestyle»Celeb News»International Celebs»Rihanna’s Fenty Beauty joins Paris Olympics and Paralympics

Singer and business mogul Rihanna and Fenty Beauty has announced a high-profile partnership with the Paris Olympics and Paralympics.

Rihanna’s Fenty Beauty will make a splash at the Paris Olympics and Paralympics. This partnership marks one of the brand’s most prestigious collaborations to date.

The global beauty mogul revealed that Fenty Beauty would be the official makeup partner for the 2024 Games.

The announcement was made through Fenty Beauty’s Instagram account, with Rihanna herself sharing the news.

“Tried to tell y’all….we outside all 2024!!! PROUD to announce that @FentyBeauty is a premium partner of the Olympic AND Paralympic Games baby!!! #FentyxParis2024 💄🏆” she exclaimed.

This encapsulated the enthusiasm and pride that comes with this significant venture.

This partnership is particularly special as it extends beyond traditional advertising, according toElle.

For the duration of the Games, Fenty Beauty will provide 600 volunteers, aged 18 to 21, with exclusive makeup kits.

These kits will include some of the brand’s most beloved products, according toLeadership.

The volunteers will not only receive these high-quality products but will also benefit from tutorials and on-site makeup artists.

These makeup artists will help them find their perfect foundation shade.

This gesture highlights Fenty Beauty’s commitment to ensuring that every volunteer looks and feels their best. It also supports their contribution to the success of the Games.

Rihanna’s involvement with the Paris Olympics and Paralympics reflects her ongoing dedication to celebrating beauty in all its forms.

It also underscores her commitment to uplifting and empowering individuals through her brand, according toThe Source.

Speaking about her vision for the brand Rihanna explained, “My mantra has always been and always will be, ‘Beauty is there to have fun with.

It should never feel like pressure or a uniform.’ I hope that carries on, because it’s an incredibly joyful and freeing way to live.”

The Olympics will kick off on 26 July and run through 11 August. This will be followed by the Paralympics from 28 August to 8 September.

The anticipation surrounding Fenty Beauty’s role is palpable.

With a global audience watching, the visibility of Fenty Beauty during such a high-profile event is expected to elevate the brand’s presence.

It will also reinforce its reputation for inclusivity and innovation.

The partnership also adds an extra layer of excitement, with fans speculating whether Rihanna herself might make an appearance at the Games.

The prospect of seeing the superstar at the Paris Olympics or Paralympics adds an extra sparkle to this already glittering collaboration.

This venture is not just about makeup but about making a statement on a grand scale.

With the Paris Olympics and Paralympics around the corner, Fenty Beauty’s partnership promises to be a highlight of the 2024 Games.

As volunteers prepare to shine in their Fenty Beauty looks, the world will undoubtedly be watching, cheering, and perhaps even catching a glimpse of Rihanna herself amidst the excitement.

title: Rihanna’s Fenty Beauty joins Paris Olympics and Paralympics

description: Singer and business mogul Rihanna and Fenty Beauty has announced a high-profile partnership with the Paris Olympics and Paralympics.
